details.reasoning: Complete implementation of all rubric requirements. The Zig file (INIObject.zig) contains properly-defined create(), parse(), and stringify() functions accepting JSGlobalObject and returning JSValue. Parse handles sections with dot notation ([a.b.c]), key=value pairs with both = and : separators, and comment lines starting with ; or # plus inline comments. Stringify generates proper INI format with section headers and nested dot notation. Wiring is correct: BunObject.zig imports INIObject, defines lazy property callback, and exports getINIObject function. C++ bindings updated in BunObject+exports.h (macro entry) and BunObject.cpp (hash table entry). TypeScript definitions provide namespace INI with parse and stringify signatures and comprehensive JSDoc. Implementation is self-contained with no external npm INI parser imports. Code follows Zig conventions using jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and proper @import statements. Comprehensive test suite covers parsing edge cases (CRLF, comments, value coercion), stringify functionality, and round-trip verification.
